verses.geez: ተሐደሳ፡ መንሌየ፡ ደሰያት፡ እስመ፡ ይትዌለጥ፡ ኃይሎሙ፡ ለመላእክት፤ ይቅረቡ፡ ኅቡረ፡ ወይንግሩ፡ ወያይድዑ፡ ፍትሐ።

translations.lxx: Hold a feast to me, ye islands: for the princes shall renew their strength: let them draw nigh and speak together: then let them declare judgment.
translations.kjv: Keep silence before me, O islands; and let the people renew their strength: let them come near; then let them speak: let us come near together to judgment.

verses.geez: መኑ፡ አንሥኦ፡ ለጻድቅ፡ እምጽባሕ፡ ወጸውዖ፡ ወትትልዎ፡ ድኅረ፡ እገሪሁ፤ ወያመጽእ፡ ድንጋፄ፡ ቅድመ፡ አሕዛብ፡ ወነገሥት።

translations.lxx: Who raised up righteousness from the east, and called it to his feet, so that it should go? shall appoint it an adversary of Gentiles, and shall dismay kings, and bury their swords in the earth, and cast forth their bows and arrows as sticks?
translations.kjv: Who raised up the righteous man from the east, called him to his foot, gave the nations before him, and made him rule over kings? he gave them as the dust to his sword, and as driven stubble to his bow.

verses.geez: ወይዴግኖሙ፡ ወየሐውራ፡ እገሪሁ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ሰላም።

translations.lxx: And he shall pursue them; the way of his feet shall proceed in peace.
translations.kjv: He pursued them, and passed safely; even by the way that he had not gone with his feet.

verses.geez: መኑ፡ ዘአጽንዐ፡ ወገብረ፡ ዘንተ፤ ወጸውዓ፡ ዘይጼውዓ፡ እምፍጥረተ፡ ዓለም።

translations.lxx: Who has wrought and done these things? he has called it who called it from the generations of old; I God, the first and to all futurity, I AM.
translations.kjv: Who hath wrought and done it, calling the generations from the beginning? I the LORD, the first, and with the last; I am he.

verses.geez: ርእዩ፡ አሕዛብ፡ ዘአጽናፈ፡ ምድር፡ ወፍርሁ፤ ቅረቡ፡ ወምጽኡ፡ ኅቡረ።

translations.lxx: The nations saw, and feared; the ends of the earth drew nigh, and came together,
translations.kjv: The isles saw it, and feared; the ends of the earth were afraid, drew near, and came.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ፡ ይትዋቀሥ፡ ለእኁሁ፡ ወኵሉ፡ ይረድእ፡ ቢጾ፡ ወይብል።

translations.lxx: every one judging for his neighbour and that to assist his brother: and one will say,
translations.kjv: They helped every one his neighbour; and every one said to his brother, Be of good courage.

verses.geez: ያጸንዕ፡ ብእሲ፡ ጸራቢ፡ ወነሃቢ፡ ዘይዘብጥ፡ በሰፌልያ፡ ወኅቡረ፡ ይዘብጥዎሙ።

translations.lxx: The artificer has become strong, and the coppersmith that smites with the hammer, and forges also: sometimes he will say, It is a piece well joined: they have fastened them with nails; they will fix them, and they shall not be moved.
translations.kjv: So the carpenter encouraged the goldsmith, and he that smootheth with the hammer him that smote the anvil, saying, It is ready for the sodering: and he fastened it with nails, that it should not be moved.

verses.geez: አንተሰ፡ እስራኤል፣፡ ገብርየ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ዘኀረይኩከ፣፡ ዘርአ፡ አብርሃም፡ ዘአፍቀርኩከ።

translations.lxx: But thou, Israel, art my servant Jacob, and he whom I have chosen, the seed of Abraam, whom I have loved:
translations.kjv: But thou, Israel, art my servant, Jacob whom I have chosen, the seed of Abraham my friend.

verses.geez: ዘተመጠውኩከ፡ እምአጽናፈ፡ ምድር፡ ወጸዋዕኩከ፡ እምግበቢሃ፡ ወእቤለከ፤ ገብርየ፡ አንተ፡ ወኀረይኩከ፡ ወኢየኀድገከ።

translations.lxx: whom I have taken hold of from the ends of the earth, and from the high places of it I have called thee, and said to thee, Thou art my servant; I have chosen thee, and I have not forsaken thee.
translations.kjv: Thou whom I have taken from the ends of the earth, and called thee from the chief men thereof, and said unto thee, Thou art my servant; I have chosen thee, and not cast thee away.

verses.geez: ኢትፍራህ፣፡ ሀሎኩ፡ ምስሌከ፤ ዑቅ፡ ኢያስሕቱከ፤ አነ፡ ውእቱ፡ አምላክከ፡ ዘአጽናዕኩከ፡ ወረዳእኩከ፡ ወአኀዝኩከ፡ በየማነ፡ ጽድቅየ።

translations.lxx: Fear not; for I am with thee: wander not; for I am thy God, who have strengthened thee; and I have helped thee, and have established thee with my just right hand.
translations.kjv: Fear thou not; for I am with thee: be not dismayed; for I am thy God: I will strengthen thee; yea, I will help thee; yea, I will uphold thee with the right hand of my righteousness.

verses.geez: ናሁ፡ የኀፍሩ፡ ወየኀሥሩ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ እለ፡ ይትቃወሙከ፡ ወይከውኑ፡ ከመ፡ ዘኢተፈጥሩ፡ ወይትሐጐሉ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ፀርከ።

translations.lxx: Behold, all thine adversaries shall be ashamed and confounded; for they shall be as if they were not: and all thine opponents shall perish.
translations.kjv: Behold, all they that were incensed against thee shall be ashamed and confounded: they shall be as nothing; and they that strive with thee shall perish.

verses.geez: ወተኀሥሦሙ፡ ወኢትረክቦሙ፡ ለሰብእ፡ እለ፡ ይሣቅዩከ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt seek them, and thou shalt not find the men who shall insolently rage against thee: for they shall be as if they were not, and they that war against thee shall not be.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt seek them, and shalt not find them, even them that contended with thee: they that war against thee shall be as nothing, and as a thing of nought.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ አነ፡ አምላክከ፡ ዘአጽናዕኩከ፡ በየማንየ፡ ወእቤለከ።

translations.lxx: For I am thy God, who holdeth thy right hand, who saith to thee,
translations.kjv: For I the LORD thy God will hold thy right hand, saying unto thee, Fear not; I will help thee.

verses.geez: ኢትፍራህ፡ ያዕቆብ፣፡ ውሑድ፡ አንተ፡ እስራኤል፤ አነ፡ ረዳእኩከ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘአድኀነከ፡ ቅዱሰ፡ እስራኤል።

translations.lxx: Fear not, Jacob, and thou Israel few in number; I have helped thee, saith thy God, he that redeems thee, O Israel.
translations.kjv: Fear not, thou worm Jacob, and ye men of Israel; I will help thee, saith the LORD, and thy redeemer, the Holy One of Israel.

verses.geez: ናሁ፡ ረሰይኩከ፡ ከመ፡ መንኰራኵረ፡ ሠረገላ፡ ዘየሐርስ፣፡ ወትዌሥር፡ ወታደክም፡ አድባረ፡ ወተሐርፅ፡ አውግረ፡ ወትሬስዮሙ፡ ከመ፡ ጸበል።

translations.lxx: Behold, I have made thee as new saw-shaped threshing wheels of a waggon; and thou shalt thresh the mountains, and beat the hills to powder, and make them as chaff:
translations.kjv: Behold, I will make thee a new sharp threshing instrument having teeth: thou shalt thresh the mountains, and beat them small, and shalt make the hills as chaff.

verses.geez: ወትደምቆሙ፡ ወያነሥኦሙ፡ ነፋስ፡ ወይዘርዎሙ፡ ዐውሎ።

translations.lxx: and thou shalt winnow them, and the wind shall carry them away, and a tempest shall scatter them: but thou shalt rejoice in the holy ones of Israel.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt fan them, and the wind shall carry them away, and the whirlwind shall scatter them: and thou shalt rejoice in the LORD, and shalt glory in the Holy One of Israel.

verses.geez: ወይትኀሠዩ፡ ነዳያን፡ እለ፡ የኀሥሡ፡ ማየ፡ ወኢይረክቡ፤ ወእለ፡ የብሰ፡ ልሳኖሙ፡ በጽምእ።

translations.lxx: And the poor and the needy shall exult; for when they shall seek water, and there shall be none, and their tongue is parched with thirst, I the Lord God, I the God of Israel will hear, and will not forsake them:
translations.kjv: When the poor and needy seek water, and there is none, and their tongue faileth for thirst, I the LORD will hear them, I the God of Israel will not forsake them.

verses.geez: አነቅዕ፡ አፍላገ፡ በውስተ፡ አድባር፡ ወአፈለፍል፡ ማእከለ፡ ገዳም፤ ወአበቍል፡ ዖመ፡ ውስተ፡ በድው፡ ወአውኅዝ፡ ማየ፡ በብሔረ፡ ጽምእ።

translations.lxx: but I will open rivers on the mountains, and fountains in the midst of plains: I will make the desert pools of water, and a thirsty land watercourses.
translations.kjv: I will open rivers in high places, and fountains in the midst of the valleys: I will make the wilderness a pool of water, and the dry land springs of water.

verses.geez: ወእሬስያ፡ ለምድረ፡ በድው፡ ብሔረ፡ አርዝ፡ ወዕፀ፡ ጴቅሳን፡ ወመርሶንን፡ ወቄጵርሶን፡ ወሌውቄን።

translations.lxx: I will plant in the dry land the cedar and box, the myrtle and cypress, and white poplar:
translations.kjv: I will plant in the wilderness the cedar, the shittah tree, and the myrtle, and the oil tree; I will set in the desert the fir tree, and the pine, and the box tree together:

verses.geez: ከመ፡ ያእምሩ፡ ወይለብዉ፡ ወይጠይቁ፡ ወይእመኑ፡ ከመ፡ እደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ገብረ፡ ዘንተ፡ ወቅዱሰ፡ እስራኤል፡ አርአየ።

translations.lxx: that they may see, and know, and perceive, and understand together, that the hand of the Lord has wrought these works, and the Holy One of Israel has displayed them.
translations.kjv: That they may see, and know, and consider, and understand together, that the hand of the LORD hath done this, and the Holy One of Israel hath created it.

verses.geez: ወአልጸቀት፡ ኵነኔክሙ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክ፤ ወቀርበ፡ ምክርክሙ፡ ይቤ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ያዕቆብ።

translations.lxx: Your judgment draws nigh, saith the Lord God; your counsels have drawn nigh, saith the King of Jacob.
translations.kjv: Produce your cause, saith the LORD; bring forth your strong reasons, saith the King of Jacob.

verses.geez: በጽሐክሙ፡ ዘይረክበክሙ፣፡ ንግሩኒ፡ ዘቀዲሙ፡ ወናእምር፡ ዘትሔልዩ፡ ወናእምር፡ ደኃሪተክሙ።

translations.lxx: Let them draw nigh, and declare to you what things shall come to pass; or tell us what things were of old, and we will apply our understanding, and we shall know what are the last and the future things:
translations.kjv: Let them bring them forth, and shew us what shall happen: let them shew the former things, what they be, that we may consider them, and know the latter end of them; or declare us things for to come.

verses.geez: ወንግሩነ፡ ዘይመጽእ፡ ወዘይከውን፡ በደኃሪት፡ ወናእምር፡ ከመ፡ አማልክት፡ አንትሙ፤ አሠንዩ፡ ወአሕሥሙ፡ ወናንክርክሙ፡ ወንጠይቅ፡ ወናእምር።

translations.lxx: tell us, declare ye to us the things that are coming on at the last time, and we shall know that ye are gods: do good, and do evil, and we shall wonder, and see at the same time
translations.kjv: Shew the things that are to come hereafter, that we may know that ye are gods: yea, do good, or do evil, that we may be dismayed, and behold it together.

verses.geez: እምአይቴ፡ አንትሙ፡ ወእምአይቴ፡ ግብርክሙ፤ አኮኑ፡ እምድር፡ ርኩስ፡ ኀረዩክሙ።

translations.lxx: whence ye are, and whence is your work: they have chosen you an abomination out of the earth.
translations.kjv: Behold, ye are of nothing, and your work of nought: an abomination is he that chooseth you.

verses.geez: ወአንሰ፡ አንሣእኩ፡ ዘእምደቡብ፡ ወዘእምሥራቀ፡ ፀሐይ፡ ከመ፡ ይሰመዩ፡ በስምየ።

translations.lxx: But I have raised up him that comes from the north, and him that comes from the rising of the sun: they shall be called by my name: let the princes come, and as potter's clay, and as a potter treading clay, so shall ye be trodden down.
translations.kjv: I have raised up one from the north, and he shall come: from the rising of the sun shall he call upon my name: and he shall come upon princes as upon morter, and as the potter treadeth clay.

verses.geez: መኑ፡ ዘይዜኑ፡ ዘትካት፡ ከመ፡ ናእምር፡ ዘእምቅድሜሁ፤ ወንበል፤ እሙን፡ ውእቱ።

translations.lxx: For who will declare the things from the beginning, that we may know also the former things, and we will say that they are true? there is no one that speaks beforehand, nor any one that hears your words.
translations.kjv: Who hath declared from the beginning, that we may know? and beforetime, that we may say, He is righteous? yea, there is none that sheweth, yea, there is none that declareth, yea, there is none that heareth your words.

verses.geez: ቀዳሚ፡ እሁባ፡ ለጽዮን፡ ወአገብኣ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍኖታ፡ ለኢየሩሳሌም።

translations.lxx: I will give dominion to Sion, and will comfort Jerusalem by the way.
translations.kjv: The first shall say to Zion, Behold, behold them: and I will give to Jerusalem one that bringeth good tidings.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ አልቦ፡ እምአሕዛብ፡ ወእምአማልክቲሆሙ፡ ዘይዜኑ፤ ወእመሂ፡ ተስእልክዎሙ፤ እምአይቴ፡ እሙንቱ፤ ኢይሠጠዉኒ።

translations.lxx: For from among the nations, behold, there was no one; and of their idols there was none to declare anything: and if I should ask them, Whence are ye? they could not answer me.
translations.kjv: For I beheld, and there was no man; even among them, and there was no counsellor, that, when I asked of them, could answer a word.

verses.geez: እለሂ፡ ይገብርዎሙ፡ ከንቶ፡ ይፈጥርዎሙ።

translations.lxx: For these are your makers, as ye think, and they that cause you to err in vain.
translations.kjv: Behold, they are all vanity; their works are nothing: their molten images are wind and confusion.
